message:
Fix security issues found during deep code review

- Fix broken isOwner() in share link route: when a link has no userId,
  ownership was granted to all callers including anonymous users. Now
  requires both the link and caller to have a valid userId.
- Redact server filesystem path from tag-mappings API response; replace
  persistedPath with a boolean 'persisted' field.
- Tighten dev bypass origin check: require explicit localhost origin/host
  instead of allowing requests with neither header.
- Add string validation for itemIds in bulk moderation endpoint.
- Sanitize prompt titles in shell install script to prevent newline injection.
- Use crypto hash fallback instead of predictable Date.now() for HEREDOC
  delimiter collision.
- Cap code fence growth loop at 100 chars to prevent quadratic blowup.
- Fix FNV-1a hash in semantic.ts to use Math.imul() for correct 32-bit
  multiplication, matching hash-embedder.ts implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
